data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds to $70,000 Amid Cooling Inflation Signs
data.description: Bitcoin's price has recovered to $70,000 after a significant market loss of $8.7 billion. According to NS3.AI, this rebound comes as inflation shows signs of cooling. Despite the price recovery, market sentiment remains cautious, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index still indicating 'extreme fear.' This suggests that investors continue to be concerned about the underlying market conditions.

data.title: Brother Machi added to his long ETH position and is currently showing a floating profit of $150,000.
data.description: According to HyperInsight monitoring, Huang Licheng's address, known as "Maji Dage," added to its ETH long position 10 minutes ago. Currently, it has a floating profit of $150,000 on 2,700 ETH with 25x leverage.

data.title: XRP Faces 60% Decline Amid Investor Panic and Market Uncertainty
data.description: XRP has seen significant losses, with panic selling driving long-term holders to exit at unprecedented rates, resulting in a 60% drop from its peak. According to NS3.AI, despite positive developments such as regulatory clarity, ETF approvals, and adoption by major firms, XRP's price remains weak at approximately $1.41, raising uncertainty about its future. Analysts suggest the current selloff might represent a capitulation phase, yet investor sentiment remains cautious amid ongoing market underperformance.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Zelensky Stresses Importance of EU Membership Date for Ukraine
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky emphasized the critical importance of setting a date for Ukraine's accession to the European Union. According to Jin10, Zelensky warned that without a clear timeline, Russian President Vladimir Putin might exert significant efforts to obstruct Ukraine's EU membership process after the war. Zelensky's remarks highlight the geopolitical tensions surrounding Ukraine's aspirations to join the EU and the potential challenges posed by Russia in the post-conflict period.

data.title: Ethereum Derivatives Reset as Open Interest Contracts Across Major Exchanges
data.description:
Ethereum’s derivatives market has entered a clear deleveraging phase, with net open interest (30-day change) showing substantial outflows across leading exchanges. The contraction is not isolated to a single venue, but distributed across major platforms.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-derivatives-reset-as-open-interest-contracts-across-major-exchanges/

data.title: Gift from Taiwan Highlights Thoughtful Connection
data.description: Crypto KOL Murphy posted on X about receiving a special gift from a Taiwanese friend, Belle, known as @0xGummyBear. This marked Murphy's first international package from Taiwan, featuring local specialties. Particularly cherished was a beautifully written card, reflecting Belle's meticulous and sincere nature. Murphy noted that Belle's writing style mirrors her social media posts, which often include purple-themed illustrations that provide warmth amidst market analyses. While the gift will eventually be unwrapped and time will pass, the heartfelt gesture will remain cherished. Murphy expressed gratitude and extended wishes for a prosperous Year of the Horse, filled with light and adventure.

data.title: Bangladesh's Incoming Administration to Address Economic Challenges
data.description: Bangladesh's Prime Minister-elect Tarique Rahman announced plans to tackle the country's economic issues. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Rahman's commitment to addressing weakened institutions and deteriorating law and order. The incoming administration aims to stabilize the fragile economy and implement reforms to strengthen governance and public safety. Rahman's leadership is expected to focus on revitalizing economic growth and improving institutional integrity.

data.title: Understanding the Role of Public and Private Keys in Digital Transactions
data.description: Crypto KOL 陈剑Jason posted on X. In a digital transaction scenario, the public key is akin to a phone number displayed in a lost and found notice, pointing to wallet assets visible to the public key owner. The private key, comparable to the owner's ID number, is required to initiate a signature on the public key, enabling the completion of the call process. The individual who finds the wallet acts as a node, verifying the correctness of the private key signature and facilitating the wallet transfer. Once the transaction is packaged, the owner retrieves a 100-unit reward from the wallet, which serves as Gas for the node.

data.title: SEC Develops Crypto Asset Taxonomy Guidance Framework
data.description: The SEC's Division of Corporation Finance is working on establishing a guidance framework for crypto asset taxonomy. According to NS3.AI, Director John Moloney confirmed this initiative on February 13, 2026, after presentations at the Securities Regulation Institute. This move highlights the SEC's continued efforts to clarify regulatory classifications for cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Zhu Su: Cryptocurrencies may outperform the seven major US tech stocks in the next few years.
data.description: Zhu Su wrote on the X platform that cryptocurrencies may significantly outperform the US tech giants (Mag7) in the next few years because it is the only vertical sector in Western technology that has a moat against China.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Expected to Outperform Major U.S. Stocks in Coming Years
data.description: On February 14, Zhu Su, co-founder of Three Arrows Capital, expressed his views on the future performance of cryptocurrencies. According to BlockBeats, Zhu Su stated that cryptocurrencies are likely to significantly outperform the seven major U.S. stocks, known as Mag7, in the coming years.

data.title: UK Prime Minister Seeks Closer Ties with EU Post-Brexit
data.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has stated that Britain has evolved since the Brexit vote and expressed his intention to strengthen the country's relationship with the European Union. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Starmer's commitment to fostering a more collaborative partnership with the EU. Starmer's remarks reflect a shift in the UK's approach to its European neighbors, aiming to enhance cooperation and address shared challenges. This move comes as the UK navigates its post-Brexit landscape, seeking to redefine its role on the international stage.

data.title: MSTR's Market Cycle: Analyzing Recent Trends
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X about the recent performance of MicroStrategy's stock, $MSTR. He noted that during the last market cycle, $MSTR reached its lowest point after 65 weeks, coinciding with its weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) falling below 30. Currently, $MSTR is in its 66th week, and its RSI dropped below 30 last week. This raises the question of whether $MSTR has reached its bottom for the current cycle.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,100 USDT with a 7.49% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2026, 11:22 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,100 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,102.469971 USDT, with a narrowed 7.49% increase in 24 hours.
